ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Interface ICarInfo


  • public interface ICarInfo
    CC值以及一些静态信息

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  ICarInfo.Functions 
      static interface  ICarInfo.VehicleTypes 

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int DEVICE_IHUID
      Number of Geely IHU device, defined by GEELY, 24 characters, first six are vendor code 获取 IHU ID, GEELY 规范的 ID, 24位, 给GEELY车机的编码, 前六位是厂商代码 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE String property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-01 14:54:46
      static int DEVICE_PROJECT_CODE
      Get project code（PCODE） 获取项目代码（PCODE）,遵循 eCarX pcode 规则, 也就是 PLM 里的项目代号 比如 XE210SH ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE String property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-01 14:57:03
      static int DEVICE_SUPPLIER_CODE
      Get supplier code 获取产品侧定义的供应商代码 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE String property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-01 14:57:49
      static int DEVICE_VEHICLE_TYPE_CONFIG
      Vehicle type configuration 获取车型配置信息, 具体的车型代号(如区分高、中、低配, 旗舰, 至尊等) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE String property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-01 14:55:53
      static int DEVICE_VER_MCU_FIRMWARE
      The last MCU firmware version MCU 软件版本名称<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC String property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-22 19:29:52
      static int DEVICE_VER_MCU_FIRMWARE_INT
      The MCU firmware version int, same withBuild.VERSION.SDK_INT<br> MCU 软件版号, OTA 升级可能需要检查此版号<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC Integer property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-22 19:31:21
      static int DEVICE_VER_MCU_HARDWARE
      The hardware version of MCU<br> MCU 硬件版本名称<br> ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC String property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-22 19:30:27
      static int DEVICE_XDSN
      Obtain the vehicle equipment identification code 获取车机设备识别码 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE String property type hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-01 14:53:14
      static int VEHICLE_MODEL_COLOR
      Car model color, original ID is SETTING_FUNC_VEHICLE_MODEL_COLOR 车模颜色，原 ID 为 SETTING_FUNC_VEHICLE_MODEL_COLOR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-16 16:37:59
      static int VEHICLE_MOTION_STATUS
      Deprecated. 
      using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#PERF_VEHICLE_SPEED instead.When the vehicle is moving forward, PERF_VEHICLE_SPEED is positive and negative when the vehicle is moving backward. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
      static int VEHICLE_TYPES
      Vehicle type, vehicle power type 车辆类型，车辆动力类型（燃油汽车、电动汽车，插电混动等） ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC ICarInfo.VehicleTypes property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-22 13:49:50

      • DEVICE_VER_MCU_FIRMWARE_INT

        static final int DEVICE_VER_MCU_FIRMWARE_INT
        The MCU firmware version int, same withBuild.VERSION.SDK_INT<br> MCU 软件版号, OTA 升级可能需要检查此版号<br>
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL

      • DEVICE_IHUID

        static final int DEVICE_IHUID
        Number of Geely IHU device, defined by GEELY, 24 characters, first six are vendor code 获取 IHU ID, GEELY 规范的 ID, 24位, 给GEELY车机的编码, 前六位是厂商代码

      • VEHICLE_MODEL_COLOR

        static final int VEHICLE_MODEL_COLOR
        Car model color, original ID is SETTING_FUNC_VEHICLE_MODEL_COLOR 车模颜色，原 ID 为 SETTING_FUNC_VEHICLE_MODEL_COLOR
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE

      • VEHICLE_MOTION_STATUS

        @Deprecated
static final int VEHICLE_MOTION_STATUS
        Deprecated. using android.car.VehiclePropertyIds#PERF_VEHICLE_SPEED instead.When the vehicle is moving forward, PERF_VEHICLE_SPEED is positive and negative when the vehicle is moving backward. --- by deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com
        Vehicle motion status, original ID is `VehMtnStVehMtnSt` 车辆运动状态，原 ID 为 `VehMtnStVehMtnSt`
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE
        • Integer property type 0 未知，1-3 静止，4-5 前行运动，6-7 向后运动
        mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-17 09:31:50
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • VEHICLE_TYPES

        static final int VEHICLE_TYPES
        Vehicle type, vehicle power type 车辆类型，车辆动力类型（燃油汽车、电动汽车，插电混动等）
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
        • VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_STATIC
        • ICarInfo.VehicleTypes property type
